## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` and `pnpm build` pass locally
- [ ] Tested the story flow in the browser (`pnpm dev` mock mode is fine)
- [ ] If generation logic or prompts changed: stories are still gentle and age-appropriate, and inappropriate prompts are still redirected
- [ ] If UI strings changed: all `src/locales/*.json` files updated
